_purpose: atom_coverage_layer -- NOT compatibility. Its only job is to make every canonical prerequisite token appear in the synthetic training gold at least once, so the held-out stays COMPOSITIONAL-OOD (seen atoms, unseen composition) instead of LEXICAL-OOD (a token first appearing at eval). These pairings are coverage scaffolding chosen to be (a) valid for the action, (b) NOT equal to any held-out signature, (c) mildly plausible -- they are deliberately kept OUT of compatibility so compatibility keeps meaning 'low-controversy business combinations', not 'everything training needs'.
_rule: Each entry teaches one prerequisite token via a single category+prereq or numeric+prereq conjunction. A model that learns these sees the token; the exact held-out combination is still never shown.

prerequisite_coverage.note: teaches cash_withdrawal_approval (held-out uses atm_withdrawal); gift cards are cash-equivalents
teaches the approve_expense_report prerequisite token (held-out uses it standalone)
